---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
---

boi

envs 155 final proj notes
- use WIDE diversity of sources -- like six sources bruhhh boi boi bah boi
- central theme: what you identify in section 1 links to section 2, etc. - try not to repeat yourself
- be as thorough and concise as you can
